steps.title: Compute the result
steps.content:
All terms with $x$ vanish.
$$f(0)=-150$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above matches choice A, -150. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so A is correct.
